evals.name: first-analysis-cycle
evals.prompt: Analyze the HotPlex gateway module for SOLID violations and DRY issues. This is the first architecture analysis pass.
evals.expected_output: Skill should initialize progress file, discover modules, select internal/gateway (analysis_count=0), pick 2-3 aspects from Phase 1 (SOLID, DRY, Coupling), read all gateway source files, identify concrete findings with file:line references, code snippets, and severity ratings, triage by confidence/ROI, create GitHub issue with structured template, update progress.json, and report coverage matrix.

assertions.name: modules-discovered
assertions.text: Modules discovered and listed in progress

assertions.name: aspect-selected
assertions.text: Phase 1 aspects selected (SOLID, DRY, or Coupling)

assertions.name: findings-concrete
assertions.text: Findings include file:line references and code snippets

assertions.name: issue-created
assertions.text: GitHub issue created with structured format

assertions.name: progress-updated
assertions.text: Progress updated with analysis_count and aspects_covered

evals.name: subsequent-cycle-target-selection
evals.prompt: Continue the architecture analysis. Pick the next module that needs analysis.
evals.expected_output: Skill should load existing progress.json, select module with lowest analysis_count (preferably 0), select 2-3 pending aspects, execute deep analysis, create GitHub issue, update progress, and show coverage matrix with visual progress of all modules.

assertions.name: module-selected-by-priority
assertions.text: Module selected based on lowest analysis_count

assertions.name: coverage-matrix-shown
assertions.text: Coverage matrix displayed with module progress

assertions.name: next-target-identified
assertions.text: Next target module identified for subsequent cycle

evals.name: re-analysis-with-depth
evals.prompt: The internal/session module has all aspects covered. Re-analyze it for deeper insights.
evals.expected_output: Skill should detect all aspects covered for session, select oldest phase (Phase 1) for re-analysis, perform deeper investigation looking for missed issues or new patterns, create GitHub issue with refined findings, increment analysis_count (now 2+), and explain this is a depth pass.
